customInstructions: This is the Official Previous Year Paper (PYP) of HP Police Constable conducted in 2016.
Total Questions: 80, Total Marks: 80, Total Time: 60 Minutes.
Historically, there was NO negative marking in this specific exam pattern.
Questions are exactly as they appeared in the actual exam.

questions.questionEn: Choose the correct meaning of the Idiom: "To die in harness"
options: To die while riding a horse

questions.questionEn: Choose the correct meaning of the Idiom: "A cock and bull story"
Choose the correct meaning of the Idiom: "To miss the bus"
Fill in the blank with correct word: I have been living here ____ 2009.
Fill in the blank with correct word: She fell prey ____ malaria.
Fill in the blank with correct word: Rohan is good ____ mathematics.
Find the opposite word of: DISASTER
Find the opposite word of: CONCUR
Choose the correctly spelt word:

Find out the incorrect part of the sentence:
My father / deals / with garments.

Find out the incorrect part of the sentence:
Knowledge of / at least two languages / are required to pass the examination.
options: are required to pass the examination

"सारी फसल" वाक्यांश में कौन सा विशेषण प्रयुक्त हुआ है?
